title: Today there are significant results in support of our country and our...
title_en: Today there are significant results in support of our country and our...
title_uk: Сьогодні є значні результати у підтримці нашої країни та нашого...
description: Today there are significant results in support of our country and our people - a productive meeting of the Contact Group on Defense of Ukraine took place. Three key things. First: More than $1 billion in new contributions to the PURL program. This is the largest amount of support for PURL announced during the Contact Group meetings. Thank you to Norway, the Netherlands, Germany, Sweden, Luxembourg, Lithuania, Latvia, Iceland and...
description_en: Today there are significant results in support of our country and our people - a productive meeting of the Contact Group on Defense of Ukraine took place. Three key things. First: More than $1 billion in new contributions to the PURL program. This is the largest amount of support for PURL announced during the Contact Group meetings. Thank you to Norway, the Netherlands, Germany, Sweden, Luxembourg, Lithuania, Latvia, Iceland and...
description_uk: Сьогодні є вагомі результати на підтримку нашої країни та наших людей – відбулася продуктивна зустріч Контактної групи з питань оборони України. Три ключові речі. Перше: нові внески в програму PURL на понад 1 мільярд доларів. Це найбільша сума підтримки PURL, оголошена в межах засідань Контактної групи. Дякуємо Норвегії, Нідерландам, Німеччині, Швеції, Люксембургу, Литві, Латвії, Ісландії та...

title: 300 drones launched
title_en: 300 drones launched
description: Have a nice night: about 300 UAVs flew to attack the Russian Federation and the occupied territories this night. We hope this morning will resemble yesterday's (on video). And maybe, as we really hope, it will be even more effective.
description_en: Have a nice night: about 300 UAVs flew to attack the Russian Federation and the occupied territories this night. We hope this morning will resemble yesterday's (on video). And maybe, as we really hope, it will be even more effective.
description_uk: Приятного на ночь: около 300 БПЛА полетели атаковать рф и оккупированные территории этой ночью Надеемся, это утро будет напоминать вчерашнее (на видео). А может, на что мы очень надеемся, оно будет еще эффектнее.

title: Ukraine is today the de facto second army of NATO, - President...
title_en: Ukraine is today the de facto second army of NATO, - President...

description: Ukraine is today the de facto second army of NATO, - President Zelensky said that Ukraine has already proven its strength on the battlefield and has actually become one of the key military forces of the Alliance. According to him, that is why NATO needs Ukraine not only de facto, but also de jure. Also, the president noted, as a result of Ramstein, nine countries supported the Patriot missile procurement program for more than $1 billion....
description_en: Ukraine is today the de facto second army of NATO, - President Zelensky said that Ukraine has already proven its strength on the battlefield and has actually become one of the key military forces of the Alliance. According to him, that is why NATO needs Ukraine not only de facto, but also de jure. Also, the president noted, as a result of Ramstein, nine countries supported the Patriot missile procurement program for more than $1 billion....
description_uk: Украина сегодня де-факто вторая армия НАТО, - Зеленский Президент заявил, что Украина уже доказала свою силу на поле боя и фактически стала одной из ключевых военных сил Альянса. По его словам, именно поэтому НАТО нуждается в Украине не только де-факто, но и де-юре. Также, отметил президент, по итогам "Рамштайна" девять стран поддержали программу закупки ракет для Patriot на сумму более $1 млрд....

title: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine took into account the...
title_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine took into account the...
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine took into account the published report of the UN Secretary General "Children and Armed Conflicts" for the year 2025, which once again records large-scale war crimes and gross violations of children's rights committed by the occupying forces of Russia on the territory of Ukraine. Among the key findings regarding Ukraine is an increase in the number of gross violations committed by the Russian armed forces,...
description_en: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine took into account the published report of the UN Secretary General "Children and Armed Conflicts" for the year 2025, which once again records large-scale war crimes and gross violations of children's rights committed by the occupying forces of Russia on the territory of Ukraine. Among the key findings regarding Ukraine is an increase in the number of gross violations committed by the Russian armed forces,...
description_uk: Міністерство закордонних справ України взяло до уваги оприлюднену доповідь Генерального секретаря ООН "Діти та збройні конфлікти" за 2025 рік, яка вчергове фіксує масштабні воєнні злочини та грубі порушення прав дітей, скоєні окупаційними військами Росії на території України. Серед ключових висновків щодо України – зростання кількості грубих порушень, вчинених російськими збройними силами,...

title: Artillery shelling
title_en: Artillery shelling
description: Yesterday I raised two pressing issues with Mark Rutte. The first is the number of ground robotic complexes. The second is long-range artillery ammunition. Now neither the first nor the second is enough. We urgently need both. Funding allocated for this is insufficient. The volumes produced by Europe are insufficient. What the Ukrainian army receives is not enough. But we can increase everything…
description_en: Yesterday I raised two pressing issues with Mark Rutte. The first is the number of ground robotic complexes. The second is long-range artillery ammunition. Now neither the first nor the second is enough. We urgently need both. Funding allocated for this is insufficient. The volumes produced by Europe are insufficient. What the Ukrainian army receives is not enough. But we can increase everything…
description_uk: Учора я порушив із Марком Рютте два нагальні питання. Перше – кількість наземних роботизованих комплексів. Друге – далекобійні артилерійські боєприпаси. Зараз не вистачає ні першого, ні другого. І те, і інше нам потрібне терміново. Фінансування, яке на це виділяється, недостатнє. Обсяги, які виробляє Європа, недостатні. Того, що отримує українська армія, недостатньо. Але ми можемо збільшити все...

Ці кошти є частиною раніше оголошеного пакету підтримки України, що адмініструється НАТО. Це вже четвертий внесок Швеції в рамках цієї ініціативи. Загальна сума шведської...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: 👀 The US Embassy in Moscow called on Americans to seek shelter during attacks by Ukrainian drones on the territory of the Russian Federation. Citizens were also advised not to approach the wreckage of UAVs, not to touch them and not to publish photos or videos of the aftermath of the strikes. The embassy reminded that in Russia this could result in fines or criminal liability. The State Department also continues to advise Americans not to visit the Russian Federation.
description_en: 👀 The US Embassy in Moscow called on Americans to seek shelter during attacks by Ukrainian drones on the territory of the Russian Federation. Citizens were also advised not to approach the wreckage of UAVs, not to touch them and not to publish photos or videos of the aftermath of the strikes. The embassy reminded that in Russia this could result in fines or criminal liability. The State Department also continues to advise Americans not to visit the Russian Federation.
description_uk: 👀 Посольство США в Москве призвало американцев искать укрытие во время атак украинских дронов на территории рф Гражданам также рекомендовали не приближаться к обломкам БПЛА, не трогать их и не публиковать фото или видео последствий ударов. В дипмиссии напомнили, что в россии за это могут грозить штрафы или уголовная ответственность. Госдеп также по-прежнему советует американцам не посещать рф.

title: Kyiv: 000 drones
title_en: Kyiv: 000 drones
description: UK to send Ukraine 150,000 drones, air defense systems using proceeds from frozen Russian assets. The U.K. will provide Ukraine with 150,000 drones and more than 350 air defense missiles and radar systems under a new military aid package worth 752 million pounds ($1 billion), the British government announced on June 18.
description_en: UK to send Ukraine 150,000 drones, air defense systems using proceeds from frozen Russian assets. The U.K. will provide Ukraine with 150,000 drones and more than 350 air defense missiles and radar systems under a new military aid package worth 752 million pounds ($1 billion), the British government announced on June 18.

According to him, if these people start to be returned to the army, the need to recruit new soldiers for some of the posts can be significantly reduced. One of the main reasons, he called refusals in transfers between...

According to him, if these people start to be returned to the army, the need to recruit new soldiers for some of the posts can be significantly reduced. One of the main reasons, he called refusals in transfers between...
description_uk: Возвращение военных из СЗЧ может снизить потребность в новой мобилизации, - Федоров Министр обороны Михаил Федоров в интервью ТСН заявил, что в СЗЧ сейчас находятся более 200 тысяч военнослужащих. По его словам, если начать возвращать этих людей в строй, потребность в наборе новых бойцов на часть должностей может заметно снизиться. Одной из главных причин он назвал отказы в переводах между...

description: Kyiv repatriates 522 bodies that Moscow claims are Ukrainian citizens. The Coordination Headquarters for the Treatment of Prisoners of War (POWs) has not specified how many civilians and military personnel were among the 522 repatriated bodies.

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
title_en: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Moscow slammed by drones 2nd time in week as Ukraine hits back at Russia. Photos and videos posted by Moscow residents to social media depicted fires and explosions in multiple locations across the city. An oil depot in Russia's Rostov Oblast was also hit overnight, causing a massive fire. Photos: Exilenova-Plus / Telegram
description_en: Moscow slammed by drones 2nd time in week as Ukraine hits back at Russia. Photos and videos posted by Moscow residents to social media depicted fires and explosions in multiple locations across the city. An oil depot in Russia's Rostov Oblast was also hit overnight, causing a massive fire. Photos: Exilenova-Plus / Telegram
